positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a glowing crescent moon floating above a cluster of highly detailed, bioluminescent deep-sea flora and fauna. Include stylized jellyfish drifting like ethereal lanterns, schools of minimalist geometric fish, and large, curled sea kelp forming an organic frame. The overall mood is magical and tranquil. Use a vibrant, high-contrast palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, luminous turquoise, and pops of neon violet. The style should be clean, vector-art inspired linework with gradients and soft glow effects, ideal for screen printing on dark fabric. Perfect central composition, symmetrical elements for balance, and clear silhouettes against a deep, dark background. Minimalist aesthetic, detailed engraving look, smooth gradients, high contrast, ultra-detailed, 4k.
negative: blurry, noisy, text, watermark, signature, logo, jpeg artifacts, low quality, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, cropped, messy composition
